---
name: 🎮 Submit a new game
about: Propose a new game to add to the collection
title: "new game: <game name>"
labels: ["new-game"]
---

## Game info

- **Name:**
- **Proposed slug** (lowercase-dashes, e.g. `my-cool-puzzle`):
- **Category:** (puzzle / arcade / shooter / racing / sports / platformer / casual / board / word-quiz / 3d)
- **Tech:** (Phaser / Three.js / vanilla HTML5)
- **One-line pitch:**

## Where can we see it?

- Source / repo link:
- Live demo (if any):

## Does it meet the bar?

- [ ] Has its own `index.html` and works standalone (no external API calls)
- [ ] Uses **relative paths** for all assets
- [ ] Folder is < ~5 MB
- [ ] Works on desktop and mobile
- [ ] You hold the rights to all assets (or they're properly licensed)
- [ ] No tracking, no ads, no signup required

## Anything else?

Notes about the game, design decisions, or special handling needed.
